summary: Iter 45 e2e testing of Sponsors CMS + Academy/Sponsors navigation. Backend: 18/18 pytest PASSED in test_sponsors_iter45.py covering public list (sorted by display_order), type filters (first_team/academy), GET seeded sponsor d857ae0c..., 404 paths, full admin CRUD (create/update/delete + persistence verification via GET), unauthenticated 401, and SPA route smoke tests for /academy*, /sponsors/*, /sponsors/{id}. Frontend: All 9 critical UI scenarios PASS - Academy dropdown shows 4 items (Lefteria FC Academy, Η Φιλοσοφία μας, Ηλικιακά Τμήματα, Εγγραφές); Χορηγοί dropdown shows 3 (Χορηγοί Πρώτης Ομάδας, Χορηγοί Ακαδημίας, Γίνε Χορηγός); /academy hero + 6 nav links; /academy/philosophy hero + Η ΠΡΟΣΕΓΓΙΣΗ ΜΑΣ section; /academy/groups shows U-age groups; /sponsors/first-team shows CYPRUS FOOTBALL ASSOCIATION with MEGA badge; /sponsors/academy shows ALPHAMEGA SUPERMARKETS with Gold; /sponsors/{id} detail shows banner, name, website button (2 external links); Admin /admin login -> Χορηγοί sidebar tab renders both sponsor cards with level badges (Mega Sponsor / Gold Sponsor), display_order #1 #1, edit + delete icons, Νέος Χορηγός CTA, type filter dropdown.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2569 get_sponsors: Pydantic returns the model; FastAPI re-encodes - good. Public listing limit hardcoded to 100; for >100 sponsors pagination would be needed, but acceptable for current scale.

server.py L2589 update_sponsor: uses SponsorCreate (full body) which means PUT requires ALL fields - this is technically a replace, not partial update. Acceptable since admin form sends full payload, but consider Optional fields if partial PATCH is needed in future.
server.py L2605 upload_sponsor_logo: file.filename.split('.')[-1] could KeyError on filenames without extension; suggest validating ext in {'png','jpg','jpeg','webp','svg'}. Low priority.

App.js L186 active dropdown highlight uses link.dropdown[0]?.path?.split('/').slice(0,2).join('/') which yields '/academy' or '/sponsors' - works correctly for current routes; brittle if first dropdown item path is changed (e.g. Sponsors first item has /sponsors/first-team - matches /sponsors prefix OK).

models.py L20 Sponsor: level/sponsor_type are str instead of the SponsorLevel/SponsorType enums declared above; values are not validated. Recommend typing as the enums to enforce mega/gold/silver/supporter and first_team/academy at API layer.
SponsorsPage filtering happens client-side via prop 'type' - confirmed it actually calls /api/sponsors?type=... per the test (filter_first_team/filter_academy returning only matching sponsors).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 scenarios verified after correcting case-sensitivity in initial assertions)

test_credentials: Admin 'Lefteria FC' / 'L3ft3r1@FC#2024$Secure!' (POST /api/auth/login). Test sponsor id d857ae0c-6bcc-4ce7-b640-985af59a5c51 (Cyprus Football Association, mega, first_team).
seed_data_creation: None permanent. CRUD test creates 'TEST_Sponsor_Iter45' then deletes it - verified via GET 404.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_sponsors_iter45.py -v. Sponsor model field is 'sponsor_type' (NOT 'type') - the GET ?type= query param is mapped to sponsor_type in server.py L2572. CSS text-transform: uppercase is applied to sponsor names in cards/hero -> use .upper() on body inner_text or query data-testid. Admin sidebar Χορηγοί item is between 'Μηνύματα' and 'ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ' as documented. Edit/Delete buttons render as pencil/trash icons inside each sponsor card.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 14 test scenarios in the request passed.
